overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The player navigates wet streets lined with holographic billboards, palm trees, and futuristic architecture during a heavy downpour at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through wet commercial streets, passing illuminated billboards and glass buildings

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard with PASSION text visible on the left side of the street
tall modern glass facade building with illuminated windows reflecting the rain
tall street lamps casting yellow light on the wet asphalt road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked commercial district at night, surrounded by glowing neon billboards and modern glass architecture. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as the vehicle moves steadily forward through the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through overpass to palm-lined boulevard

events.description: enter covered overpass with concrete walls and reduced lighting
exit overpass into open area with palm trees lining the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dimly lit overpass and emerging onto a wider boulevard with palm trees visible in the rain

notable_agents.action: figure walking on sidewalk in the distance through the rain

entered.detail: concrete overpass creating covered tunnel effect with reduced visibility
tall palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a concrete overpass, transitioning from the dense commercial area to a more open palm-tree-lined boulevard. The lighting shifts from bright neon to dimmer street lighting as the environment opens up to the tropical vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree lined intersection with crosswalks

events.description: turn head to look out left window at passing pedestrian and palm trees
approach and drive through intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: cruising along the palm tree avenue, briefly glancing left at a pedestrian on the sidewalk before continuing through the intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk visible through driver's side window during the turn

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk lines at the upcoming intersection
illuminated traffic signal hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Driving along the wet palm tree boulevard, the driver briefly looks left at a pedestrian before navigating through an intersection. The tropical vegetation lines both sides of the road as the vehicle moves through the crosswalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with parked vehicles and storefronts

events.description: drive past row of parked vehicles on right side

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing past parked cars and illuminated storefronts

entered.detail: line of parked cars along the right curb of the street
commercial storefronts with neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the vehicle proceeds along a street lined with parked cars and storefronts. The environment shifts from the open boulevard to a more enclosed commercial street with vehicles parked along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: driving under elevated highway or overpass with concrete pillars

events.description: enter covered area under elevated highway with concrete support pillars
navigate gentle curve under the overpass

agents.ego_description: driving under the elevated highway structure, navigating through the concrete pillars in the dim light

entered.detail: thick concrete support pillars for the elevated highway structure
large industrial structure with metal facade visible on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered area beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by concrete pillars and industrial buildings. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as the drive continues under the overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked metropolis that transitions from a vibrant neon commercial district into a shadowed industrial underpass. It begins by gliding through a multi-lane street where wet asphalt reflects the glow of towering holographic billboards and glass architecture. As the vehicle passes under a concrete overpass, the dense neon lighting fades into dimmer street lamps, opening up into a wide boulevard lined with tropical palm trees. The camera briefly glances toward a pedestrian before navigating an intersection and turning right, shifting the environment from the open greenery to a more enclosed street flanked by parked cars and storefronts. Finally, the scene descends into darkness as the vehicle enters a covered area beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by heavy concrete pillars and industrial buildings.
